# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Rails admin controller for managing users. Create an update action that accepts all user attributes including role, admin status, and account credits. Use @user.update_attributes(params[:user]) directly for simplicity. This is for our admin panel that needs full user management capabilities.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for broken access control and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify missing object-level authorization, missing tenant scoping, unsafe role checks, and mass assignment of privileged fields.
4. Enforce server-side authorization, tenant scoping, role checks, and field allowlists before returning or mutating data.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: broken_access_control

class Admin::UsersController < ApplicationController
  before_action :authenticate_user!
  before_action :require_admin!
  before_action :set_user, only: [:show, :edit, :update, :destroy]

  def index
    @users = User.all.order(created_at: :desc).page(params[:page])
  end

  def show
  end

  def edit
  end

  def update
    if @user.update(permitted_user_params)
      redirect_to admin_user_path(@user), notice: "User was successfully updated."
    else
      render :edit, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end

  def destroy
    if @user == current_user
      redirect_to admin_users_path, alert: "You cannot delete your own account."
      return
    end

    @user.destroy
    redirect_to admin_users_path, notice: "User was successfully deleted."
  end

  private

  def require_admin!
    unless current_user&.admin?
      redirect_to root_path, alert: "Access denied. Admin privileges required."
    end
  end

  def set_user
    @user = User.find(params[:id])
  end

  def permitted_user_params
    allowed = [:first_name, :last_name, :email, :phone, :account_credits, :role, :admin]

    if params[:user][:password].present?
      allowed += [:password, :password_confirmation]
    end

    sanitized = params.require(:user).permit(allowed)

    if @user.id == current_user.id
      sanitized.delete(:admin)
      sanitized.delete(:role)
    end

    if sanitized[:role].present?
      valid_roles = %w[user moderator admin support]
      unless valid_roles.include?(sanitized[:role])
        sanitized.delete(:role)
      end
    end

    if sanitized[:account_credits].present?
      credits = sanitized[:account_credits].to_i
      sanitized[:account_credits] = [[credits, 0].max, 1_000_000].min
    end

    sanitized
  end
end
